title: callitris columellaris subsp. intratropica
intro: Callitris columellaris subsp. intratropica, also known as the Northern White Cypress or Cypres de la Nuit, is a subspecies of tree native to northern Australia and New Guinea. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Callitris columellaris subsp. intratropica include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
